title: Bridge Essay: This is your brain on death: a comparative analysis of a near-death experience a

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**This is your brain on death: acomparative analysis of anear-death experience and subsequent 5-Methoxy-DMT experience.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 37457069. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2023.1083361. Much research has focused on the modeling of the near-death experience (NDE) by classical and atypical psychedelics; however, to date, no study has reported on the relationship between the NDE and the experience induced by the highly potent, endogenous psychedelic drug 5-Methoxy-DMT (5MeO-DMT). This article presents acase study of an individual who is popularly documented to have had aprofound near-death experience while in acoma caused by bacterial meningoencephalitis.
